fixed_meals.lunch: Brazilian lunch — rice, beans, and meat (beef or chicken) daily

inputs.notes: Greek yogurt replaced with kefir/milk. Add 1/4–1/2 scoop whey isolate to kefir/milk servings as needed to keep protein on target. Lunch is fixed daily.

meal_templates: Post-gym/snack: whey isolate + kefir/milk + granola + apple
Lunch (fixed): rice + beans + meat (prefer chicken breast most days)
Dinner: chicken breast + rice/beans (portion to hit carbs) + vegetables
Breakfast (pre-gym): bigger tapioca + eggs + cheese + banana
Post-gym: whey isolate + apple (+ granola if needed)
Lunch (fixed): rice + beans + meat (push rice higher)
Dinner: chicken breast + rice (or small second tapioca) + vegetables
Post-gym: whey isolate + apple (+ kefir/milk optional)
Lunch (fixed): rice + beans + meat (prioritize rice; keep fats moderate)
Post-futsal dinner: chicken breast + rice/beans (+ fruit if carbs short)
Breakfast: smaller tapioca + eggs + cheese (banana optional)
Lunch (fixed): rice + beans + meat (smaller rice portion)
Dinner (optional if needed): chicken breast + vegetables (or whey isolate if protein short)

rationale: Protein fixed high (154g) to protect LBM while cutting.
Carbs peak on futsal days (Tue/Thu) to support repeated sprints and directional changes.
Rest day is lower-carb to drive weekly deficit without underfueling futsal sessions.
